title: kewa suffruticosa
intro: Kewa suffruticosa, also known as the Himalayan kewa, is a type of shrub native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Kewa suffruticosa include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Kewa suffruticosa can be made into teas, infusions, and powders, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
